comments.text: This looks like it took hours of meticulous editing. I make similar high-quality videos and absolutely respect this level of work!

comments.author: @trueunrealglobe
comments.text: I always end up watching your documentaries all the way through. There's something about discovering unfamiliar places that keeps me completely engaged from the first minute to the last.
